The endpoint allows unauthenticated users to delete memory records by specifying arbitrary user identifiers (e.g., user_id, run_id, agent_id) in the request query parameters. A remote attacker can exploit this by sending unauthenticated DELETE requests to erase memory data for any user, leading to unauthorized data loss and denial of service.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00386, "percentile": 0.30522}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-gq6f-qwv9-rf4j", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-05-27T22:46:15Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-gq6f-qwv9-rf4j", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-gq6f-qwv9-rf4j"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-31241"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-05-12T18:16:52Z", "published_at": "2026-05-12T18:30:41Z", "references": ["https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-31241", "https://github.com/mem0ai/mem0", "https://www.notion.so/CVE-2026-31241-35d1e139318881459ae5e6f0d7dc6f0f", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-gq6f-qwv9-rf4j"], "repository_advisory_url": null, "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/mem0ai/mem0", "summary": "mem0 server lacks authentication and authorization controls for its memory deletion API endpoint", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-27T22:46:15Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-gq6f-qwv9-rf4j", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": null, "package": {"ecosystem": "pip", "name": "mem0ai"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 1.0.0"}], "withdrawn_at": null}
